html:
Exclusive to:

Active Ancient Guard PostInactive Ancient Guard Post

The Ancient Guard Post is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is common in the Ancient Archive biome.

Ancient Guard Posts are activated by the Archive Switch. When activated, they send Security Pulses toward Sentrypede Husks to activate them into fully functioning Ancient Sentrypedes.

Ancient Guard Post

Ancient Guard Post can also be found inside Sanctum with slightly different looks as the ones in Ancient Archive.

There are a total of 5 Ancient Guard Posts within the Sanctum. Three of the five Hall Rooms each contain one, while the Generator Room contains two.

Security Pulse

The Security Pulse is emitted by Ancient Guard Post. It roams into the Ancient Archive corridor until it is absorbed by a Sentrypede Husk to reanimate it into an Ancient Sentrypede. A Security Pulse can also be absorbed by a Spark Ark when placed on the floor. A Security Pulse does not collide with players or structures.

Holding an Waymark Compass also attracts nearby Security Pulse. Up to 4 Security Pulse can follow the player until they unequip the Compass, or are near a Pulse Cradle or a dormant Guard Tower.

After absorbed, the Ancient Guard Post regenerates another Security Pulse after 2 minutes.

Trivia

  • The Ancient Guard Post was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Exclusive to:
Active Ancient Guard PostInactive Ancient Guard Post
“It looks inviting.”
–Wilson, examining an active Ancient Guard Post.
“Yeah, that doesn't look suspicious.”
–Willow, examining an active Ancient Guard Post.
“Wolfgang was wrong, is very bad.”
–Wolfgang, examining an active Ancient Guard Post.
“How sad... there's nobody left to guard.”
–Wendy, examining an active Ancient Guard Post.
“YOU'RE LOOKING SPRY FOR YOUR AGE”
–WX-78, examining an active Ancient Guard Post.
“It appears to be a remarkably advanced security system.”
–Wickerbottom, examining an active Ancient Guard Post.
“I'm not sure I like the look of it.”
–Woodie, examining an active Ancient Guard Post.
“Hm. I have a bad feeling...”
–Maxwell, examining an active Ancient Guard Post.
“It guards these halls.”
–Wigfrid, examining an active Ancient Guard Post.
“It's got a little night light inside!”
–Webber, examining an active Ancient Guard Post.
“How strange!”
–Warly, examining an active Ancient Guard Post.
“Woke up”
–Wormwood, examining an active Ancient Guard Post.
“They really built things to last back then.”
–Winona, examining an active Ancient Guard Post.
“Oooh how fun! A trap!”
–Wortox, examining an active Ancient Guard Post.
“Ooooh, got more fancy!”
–Wurt, examining an active Ancient Guard Post.
“Any respectable ancient ruin should have some kind of traps.”
–Walter, examining an active Ancient Guard Post.
“Oh botheration, I think I just remembered something...”
–Wanda, examining an active Ancient Guard Post.
“Whatever it did, it's not doing it anymore.”
–Wilson, examining an inactive Ancient Guard Post.
“Whatever it is, it's not working.”
–Willow, examining an inactive Ancient Guard Post.
“Seems fine to Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang, examining an inactive Ancient Guard Post.
“There's no life in it.”
–Wendy, examining an inactive Ancient Guard Post.
“REQUIRES ENERGY TO ACTIVATE”
–WX-78, examining an inactive Ancient Guard Post.
“I wonder what its intended purpose was.”
–Wickerbottom, examining an inactive Ancient Guard Post.
“Not much happening with this thing.”
–Woodie, examining an inactive Ancient Guard Post.
“It's powerless.”
–Maxwell, examining an inactive Ancient Guard Post.
“It is at rest.”
–Wigfrid, examining an inactive Ancient Guard Post.
“Aw, it doesn't do anything.”
–Webber, examining an inactive Ancient Guard Post.
“It's quiet.”
–Warly, examining an inactive Ancient Guard Post.
“Sleeping”
–Wormwood, examining an inactive Ancient Guard Post.
“Bet if it had some power it'd start right up.”
–Winona, examining an inactive Ancient Guard Post.
“Now what are you, and what did you do?”
–Wortox, examining an inactive Ancient Guard Post.
“Is fancy.”
–Wurt, examining an inactive Ancient Guard Post.
“It doesn't seem to work anymore.”
–Walter, examining an inactive Ancient Guard Post.
“What a curious relic.”
–Wanda, examining an inactive Ancient Guard Post.
The Ancient Guard Post is a naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is common in the Ancient Archive biome.
Ancient Guard Posts are activated by the Archive Switch. When activated, they send Security Pulses toward Sentrypede Husks to activate them into fully functioning Ancient Sentrypedes.

Security Pulse
Object Info
Perk
Reanimate Ancient Sentrypede.
Miscellaneous
"archive_security_pulse"
“Where are you going? Someplace interesting?”
–Wilson
“Hey! Get back here!”
–Willow
“Where you going? Wolfgang will follow!”
–Wolfgang
“Where are you going?”
–Wendy
“ERRATIC ELECTRICAL CURRENT. NOTHING TO WORRY ABOUT”
–WX-78
“It seems unwise to follow it.”
–Wickerbottom
“Hey Luce, should we be worried aboot that?”
–Woodie
“Don't let it escape!”
–Maxwell
“Where are yöu göing, Ö will-ö'-wisp?”
–Wigfrid
“Wait for us!”
–Webber
“C'est beau! I wonder where it's going?”
–Warly
“Come back friend!”
–Wormwood
“Just where do you think you're going?”
–Winona
“A fellow fae come to show me the way? I think not, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Floaty glowy! Come back!”
–Wurt
“Come on Woby, let's see where it goes!”
–Walter
“Hurry, someone catch it before-!”
–Wanda
The Security Pulse is emitted by Ancient Guard Post. It roams into the Ancient Archive corridor until it is absorbed by a Sentrypede Husk to reanimate it into an Ancient Sentrypede. A Security Pulse can also be absorbed by a Spark Ark when placed on the floor. A Security Pulse does not collide with players or structures.
Holding an Waymark Compass also attracts nearby Security Pulse. Up to 4 Security Pulse can follow the player until they unequip the Compass, or are near a Pulse Cradle or a dormant Guard Tower.
After absorbed, the Ancient Guard Post regenerates another Security Pulse after 2 minutes.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Ancient Guard Post was introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Trạm Bảo Vệ Cổ Đại là một vật thể sinh sản tự nhiên dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together. Nó phổ biến trong quần thể Kho Lưu trữ Cổ đại.

The '''Ancient Guard Post''' is a naturally spawning object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It is common in the [[Ancient Archive]] biome.

Ancient Guard Posts are activated by the [[Archive Switch]]. When activated, they send Security Pulses toward [[Ancient Sentrypede#Sentrypede Husk|Sentrypede Husk]]s to activate them into fully functioning [[Ancient Sentrypede]]s.

The '''Security Pulse''' is emitted by Ancient Guard Post. It roams into the Ancient Archive corridor until it is absorbed by a Sentrypede Husk to reanimate it into an Ancient Sentrypede.
